title: Get Out
emotion_summary: Feels like standing alone on a windy rooftop in the 1980s, heart racing under cold neon lights. A clash of urgency and emotional chaos wrapped in synth.

title: It Will Rain
emotion_summary: Like waiting for someone who may never return. You’re stuck on one lyric that feels like morphine in emotional form, the rest fading into noise.

title: Stay Lost With Me
emotion_summary: Foggy mornings in Door County. Gentle solitude. Like a memory you want to relive even if it never happened the way you remember.

title: Calico
emotion_summary: Peaceful, almost sacred. Feels like walking through pine trees in June with no one around but your thoughts. The air smells like green and quiet.

title: Hell or High Water
emotion_summary: Raw. Feels like trying to move forward with a scar that still hurts. Gentle voice, but heavy soul. Emotional endurance in sound.

title: Ghost in the Night
emotion_summary: Wandering alone with a soft heartbeat echoing behind you. Haunting yet strangely comforting. A song for empty city streets.

title: Victory
emotion_summary: This is the music of standing up again after being broken. You feel like a warrior walking through fire — alive, resolute, unstoppable.

title: Blinding Lights
emotion_summary: Feels like a reckless night drive under electric stars. The synths take you to a cold 80s future that never happened but should’ve.

title: The Perfect Girl
emotion_summary: This song doesn’t end — it evaporates. Cold, distant, and softly dissolving into the night like a memory you can’t hold onto.

title: Space Song
emotion_summary: Like drifting into deep space and watching your life through a window. Cosmic nostalgia with the glow of loneliness.

title: Not Afraid
emotion_summary: Fueled by defiance. The inner monologue of someone who’s been through hell but chooses to rise, alone if necessary.

title: Remember the Name
emotion_summary: The soundtrack of earned respect. No shortcuts, no privilege — just 100% effort. It’s your code in a beat.

title: Days of Summer
emotion_summary: Bittersweet like flipping through old photographs. Feels like a soft goodbye to a time that made you who you are.

title: An Unfinished Life
emotion_summary: Epic in silence. Like staring at a storm that’s inside you. It’s heavy, cinematic, but deeply personal.

title: Only Time
emotion_summary: A timeless drift. Feels like staring into the ocean at dusk, questioning everything and accepting nothing.
